text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What do you take me for? That wasn't nearly
enough to exhaust me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Once we get back to the academy, we'll analyze
this race. You go on ahead.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I... want to cool down a bit before heading back.
I'll catch up to you, so no need to wait for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove claims she isn't tired, but her behavior
says otherwise. It might be worth adjusting her
schedule.
